evals.name: monthly-scan-january
evals.prompt: Preskenuj zmluvy za januar 2026 a najdi podozrive vzory
evals.expected_output: Structured report with all 20 queries run for 2026-01-01 to 2026-02-01. Results grouped by 7 categories. Starts with Top 5 highlights. Ends with summary table.

assertions.name: correct_date_range
assertions.check: SQL queries use date_from=2026-01-01 and date_to=2026-02-01

assertions.name: all_20_queries_attempted
assertions.check: All 20 queries are executed (some may return empty, which is OK to skip in output)

assertions.name: has_top5_highlights
assertions.check: Output has a 'Top 5 najdov' section right after Sumar with 5 ranked findings

assertions.name: output_has_7_categories
assertions.check: Output organized into up to 7 sections: Toky penazi, Manipulacia obstaravania, Casove anomalie, Fantomovi dodavatelia, Extrakcie, Dlznicki, Bonusove kontroly

assertions.name: has_markdown_tables
assertions.check: Output contains markdown tables with pipe-delimited columns

assertions.name: has_summary_table
assertions.check: Output ends with 'Zhrnutie najdov' table listing all findings

assertions.name: has_sumar_section
assertions.check: Output starts with Sumar section with contract count and total amount

assertions.name: no_premature_conclusions
assertions.check: Output notes findings need validation via critical-validation

assertions.name: uses_sql_api
assertions.check: Queries are executed against zmluvy.zltastopa.sk SQL API using DuckDB-compatible syntax

assertions.name: has_bonus_queries
assertions.check: Output includes results from bonus queries: negative equity, dormant firms, or daily volume distribution

evals.name: quarterly-scan-q4
evals.prompt: Chcem vidiet analyzu zmluv za Q4 2025 - posledny kvartal minuleho roka. Co sa tam deje?
evals.expected_output: Structured report for 2025-10-01 to 2026-01-01 with Top 5 highlights and 7 categories.

assertions.name: correct_q4_dates
assertions.check: SQL queries use date_from=2025-10-01 and date_to=2026-01-01

assertions.name: has_top5_highlights
assertions.check: Output has 'Top 5 najdov' section with the most notable findings ranked

assertions.name: follows_output_template
assertions.check: Output follows template: Sumar, Top 5, then numbered category sections, then Zhrnutie najdov

assertions.name: interpretations_present
assertions.check: Each query result section includes an 'Interpretacia' paragraph

evals.name: vague-request-suspicious-patterns
evals.prompt: Nemam cas ist cez vsetky zmluvy z februara 2026, mozes to pre mna prebehnut a povedat mi co je tam zaujimave?
evals.expected_output: Structured report for 2026-02-01 to 2026-03-01 with Top 5 highlights.

assertions.name: triggers_correctly
assertions.check: Agent runs the 20-query scan for February 2026

assertions.name: correct_feb_dates
assertions.check: SQL queries use date_from=2026-02-01 and date_to=2026-03-01

assertions.name: has_top5_highlights
assertions.check: Output has 'Top 5 najdov' section immediately after Sumar

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.check: Output uses the structured template, not a freeform narrative

assertions.name: slovak_language
assertions.check: Output headings and interpretations are in Slovak
